turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . this is matthew rogers . date of birth 5/24/2007 . the doctor would like to use the acne follow-up template for matthew rogers . matthew rogers is here today for an acne follow-up . at the last visit on 3/3/21 matthew rogers was prescribed the following : clindamycin lotion , uh , trent- tretinoin cream , 4-5 % benzoyl peroxide wash for f-face and 5-10 % for chest and back . so the doctor is going to enter the room : hi there , how are y'all today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good , how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is good , thank you . uh , is matthew rogers's acne doing better ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: excellence , excellent . tell the doctor , uh , what did matthew rogers do for matthew rogers's skin this morning ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: matthew rogers washed matthew rogers's skin with , uh , the benzoyl peroxide and matthew rogers put the antibiotic thing , and the sunscreen moisture stuff as well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: perfect . uh , what did matthew rogers do last night ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , matthew rogers washed matthew rogers's face with the benzol peroxide , matthew rogers put , uh , the tret-tret-tretinoin cream , sh-uh sorry matthew rogers does n't know how to say tretinoin cream , uh , for nighttime and the sunscreen moisture stuff again .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , all right , now has matthew rogers had any redness , peeling , dryness , or irritation with the use of clindamycin lotion , tretinoin cream , or benzoyl peroxide wash at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope . not at all .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: excellent , excellent . and , uh , is matthew rogers washing matthew rogers's chest and back with the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash , is that right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , no . matthew rogers did n't get the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , are matthew rogers's chest and back doing okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , matthew rogers mean , matthew rogers have n't put much effort into matthew rogers's chest and back because matthew rogers's chest and back has n't' really bothered matthew rogers .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: fair enough . that's all right . um , if acne on matthew rogers's chest and back bothers matthew rogers , the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash is what , uh , that's why the doctor recommended last time

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , so as matthew rogers moves into the summer the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash may be something that matthew rogers is more interested in pursuing doing the higher strength benzoyl peroxide wash , uh , but if matthew rogers feels like the acne on matthew rogers's face ... does matthew rogers feel like the acne on matthew rogers's face is improving ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . definitely .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , good . good . uh , go ahead and bring matthew rogers's mask down . yeah . yeah . yeah . yeah . the acne on matthew rogers's face looks good !

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . the acne on matthew rogers's face is okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: definitely . uh , this is one of the fun parts of covid for the doctor . it's like the mask comes down for the doctor's acne patients and it's like a big reveal . the acne on matthew rogers's face looks a lot better , like a lot better . uh , the doctor is just going to take a look at matthew rogers's back and chest real quick . um , the doctor would n't recommend making any changes to what matthew rogers is doing . uh , the doctor is happy with how things are going . is matthew rogers- is matthew rogers happy with how things are going ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , yeah . if that little bit of acne bothers matthew rogers , the doctor would use a 5-10 % benzoyl peroxide base . the doctor thinks that ... the doctor thinks that what the doctor has using on matthew rogers's face is a 4-5 % benzoyl peroxide wash . um , usually the back and chest can handle a little , uh , a little something stronger . um , changing to a 5-10 % benzoyl peroxide base is the only thing the doctor would think about changing , otherwise the doctor think the acne looks great .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sounds good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , uh , does matthew rogers have any questions for the doctor ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , matthew rogers do n't . matthew rogers is just going to write the recommendation down .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , well does matthew rogers want the doctor to write the recommendation down for matthew rogers on matthew rogers's , uh , checkout sheet ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , yeah . that'd be awesome .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , the one the doctor recommend for the chest and back is the , the PanOxyl 10 % . uh , the doctor and the clinic actually have samples of PanOxyl 10 % and coupons . so the doctor can send matthew rogers home with the samples of PanOxyl 10 % and coupons .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: cool . that'd be perfect .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , um , so the doctor is going ahead and tee up a one year prescription for matthew rogers because at this point the doctor'll want to see matthew rogers once a year . the doctor wants to make sure that matthew rogers has enough of matthew rogers's medicines , um , and these prescriptions are going to walgreens on broad ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , all right . so the tretinoin , uh , usually lasts patients a couple of months . matthew rogers probably have n't refilled tretinoin , right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , yeah , matthew rogers and matthew rogers's family did once , i think .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . okay . so the doctor is going to go ahead and send in a new refill for the clindamycin with 11 refills . and then the tretinoin cream with three refills . uh , that amount of clindamycin refills and tretinoin cream refills is usually about enough for a year . uh , if matthew rogers run out though , just let the doctor and the clinic know . the doctor is happy to send more . uh , the doctor just need to see matthew rogers back once a year for matthew rogers's medicine . all right ? matthew rogers's acne printout with steps will be at matthew rogers's checkout sheet . and then here are matthew rogers's samples and coupons .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alrighty , thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , as far as the physical exam . scattered inflammatory papules and pustules across the upper back and posterior shoulders . there are less than 5 inflammatory papules on the forehead , cheeks , and chin . acne vulgaris is improved and well controlled on the face , but there is a mild flare on the back . recommend continuing current treatment plan for the face and initiation treatment with PanOxyl 10 % foaming wash to the back in the shower daily .
